name: Trick Moon
overview: Slacker wolf pups Trickshot and Pocket become the reluctant guardians of a Magic Moonstone when their heroic big brother is trapped inside. When a disgruntled wizard steals the moonstone, Trick and Pocket jump at the chance to prove themselves, show off their cool moves, and oh yeah... save their big brother.

trailers.title: Trick Moon | Cartoon Network Studios Shorts | Cartoon Network
